properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Most worthy, worthy of praise Exalted above all things my God You are my God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Your splendor and majesty Your wonder fills everything My God, You are my God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy is the Lord, Holy is the Lord, Almighty, Seated on the throne Seated on the throne of glory High and lifted up Your presence fills the temple when we worship You Oh we worship You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Creation points to the King The heavens can't help but sing to You To You, our God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Hallelujah, to the one who came and made a way Hallelujah, to the one who died and rose again Hallelujah, to the only name above all names Glory and honor and power forever.
